turns.reference_transcript: She had your dark suit in greasy wash water all year.

turns.reference_transcript: Don't ask me to carry an oily rag like that.

turns.reference_transcript: My father ran him off here six years ago.

turns.reference_transcript: Here, he is, quite persuasively, the very embodiment of meanness and slyness.
